title: Rise Against The Storm

sections.label: Intro
lines: Hear my cry, O defender divine,
Shield my soul, let Your justice shine.
From shadows deep, Your hand extends,
To lift the broken, to make amends.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Enemies circle, their swords unsheathe,
Spiteful whispers, they plot and seethe.
Yet in the valley, I stand unbowed,
For in Your truth, I am avowed.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Let arrows of light strike down deceit,
Let truth and mercy take their seat.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise, rise, O shield of might!
Defend the just through darkest night.
A righteous flame, eternal and bright,
Rise, O shield of might, rise!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They dig a pit, they set their snare,
But justice turns, for You are fair.
Their nets entangle their wicked ways,
While truth ascends and crowns our days.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let the righteous sing, let their voices soar,
Like a lion’s roar on freedom's shore.
O my soul, rejoice, for the battle's won,
Justice flows like rivers run!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise, rise, O shield of might!
Defend the just through darkest night.
A righteous flame, eternal and bright,
Rise, O shield of might, rise!

sections.label: Breakdown
lines: In stillness I wait, my hope secure,
Your promises faithful, strong, and pure.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Rise, rise, O shield of might!
Defend the just through darkest night.
A righteous flame, eternal and bright,
Rise, O shield of might, rise!

sections.label: Outro
lines: From shadows deep, Your hand extends,
To lift the broken, to make amends.

epigraph: and stop the way against them that persecute me
